tasks.subject: Layer M Task 1: Drop HostedEngineConfig.model + migration model_validator
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove the duplicated `model` field from `HostedEngineConfig` and replace it with a load-time migration error that points users at `spec.model`. Pydantic `extra="forbid"` added as backstop. All existing `HostedEngineConfig(model="m", ...)` test constructions updated to drop the `model=` kwarg.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/config.py` — HostedEngineConfig class (lines 118–186)
- Test: `tests/core/test_config.py` — 8 existing constructions edited; 3 new tests appended

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- HostedEngineConfig.model removed
- model_config = ConfigDict(extra="forbid")
- model_validator(mode="before") raises migration ValueError
- 8 existing test sites retrofitted
- 3 new tests pass
- pre-commit clean

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/core/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HostedEngineConfig.model field removed", "model_config = ConfigDict(extra=forbid) declared", "model_validator(mode=before) raises with migration message", "8 existing HostedEngineConfig(model=...) test sites retrofitted", "Test 1: stale-field YAML raises ValidationError with both field names in message", "Test 2: clean YAML loads", "Test 3: model_dump roundtrip preserves spec.model", "pre-commit clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Layer M Task 2: Rewire HostedAPIEngine.key_base to cfg.spec.model; retrofit _BASE_CFG
tasks.description:
**Goal:** key_base(cfg) reads cfg["spec"]["model"] and raises ConfigError on empty. Retrofit _BASE_CFG + AC1/AC6 + add ConfigError test.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/engines/hosted/__init__.py` — key_base (415–429); add ConfigError import
- Test: `tests/engines/test_hosted.py` — rewrite _BASE_CFG + AC1/AC6; append test 5

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- key_base reads cfg.spec.model
- ConfigError raised on empty/missing
- _BASE_CFG restructured
- AC1, AC6, new test 5 pass
- pre-existing tests pass

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_hosted.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/hosted/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_hosted.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_hosted.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["key_base reads cfg.spec.model", "ConfigError raised on missing/empty spec.model", "_BASE_CFG restructured with spec block", "AC1 and AC6 pass against new contract", "New test_layer_m_key_base_raises_when_spec_model_missing passes", "pre-existing hosted tests pass", "pre-commit clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Layer M Task 3: Update examples/configs/hosted.yaml + rewrite test_hosted_yaml_has_non_empty_spec
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete engine.hosted.model line + sync comment block from example YAML. Rewrite the equality-lock test.

**Files:**
- Modify: `examples/configs/hosted.yaml` — delete line 20 + lines 41–46
- Test: `tests/test_examples.py` — rewrite test 239–246; append new lock test

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- hosted.yaml has exactly one `model:` (under spec:)
- comment block deleted
- equality-lock test rewritten
- new lock test passes
- load_config(hosted.yaml) succeeds

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/test_examples.py -v`


tasks.subject: Layer M Task 4: Inject http_get_bytes seam into GenerateClipStage; thread Artifact.headers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add injectable http_get_bytes seam + module-level _default_http_get_bytes helper; rewire _artifact_bytes http(s) branch.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py` — helper + dataclass field + rewire
- Test: `tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py` — append 4 tests (7–10)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- _default_http_get_bytes(url, headers) exists at module level
- http_get_bytes optional dataclass field added
- _artifact_bytes routes via seam with dict(artifact.headers)
- 4 new tests pass
- pre-existing tests pass

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py", "tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_default_http_get_bytes helper exists at module level", "GenerateClipStage.http_get_bytes optional field added", "_artifact_bytes routes via the seam with artifact.headers", "Test 7 (spy receives exact headers) passes", "Test 8 (empty headers → empty dict, not None) passes", "Test 9 (file:// bypasses seam) passes", "Test 10 (default seam Request has Authorization) passes", "pre-existing tests pass", "pre-commit clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Layer M Task 5: HostedAPIBackend.result populates Authorization: Bearer header
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Thread API token via HostedAPIEngine.backend()→HostedAPIBackend; populate Artifact.headers with Authorization: Bearer when token non-empty.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/engines/hosted/__init__.py` — backend __init__/result/engine.backend
- Test: `tests/engines/test_hosted.py` — append tests 11 + 12

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- HostedAPIBackend.__init__ accepts auth_token
- self._auth_token stored as str
- engine.backend resolves cred + passes through
- result() populates Authorization Bearer when token non-empty
- empty token → headers={}
- 2 new tests pass

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_hosted.py -v && pixi run pytest tests/ -x`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/hosted/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_hosted.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_hosted.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HostedAPIBackend.__init__ accepts auth_token kwarg", "self._auth_token stored as str (empty when None)", "HostedAPIEngine.backend resolves cred and passes through", "result() populates Authorization: Bearer when token non-empty", "result() empty headers dict when token empty", "Test 11 (bearer populated end-to-end) passes", "Test 12 (empty token → empty headers) passes", "pre-existing tests pass", "pre-commit clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Layer M Task 6: E2E integration test + README + PROGRESS Phase 23 + close branch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** E2E integration test composing Tasks 4+5. README breaking-change subsection. PROGRESS Phase 23 entry. Close PROGRESS:155 follow-ups #1 + #2. Branch ready for --no-ff merge.

**Files:**
- Test: `tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py` — append integration test 13
- Modify: `README.md` — Breaking changes Layer M subsection
- Modify: `PROGRESS.md` — Phase 23 entry + Single-next-action + follow-ups closed

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Integration test 13 passes (E2E hosted-auth → seam → store)
- README Breaking changes Layer M subsection with YAML diff
- PROGRESS Phase 23 entry follows existing format
- Single-next-action points at Layer N candidate
- Follow-ups #1 + #2 marked CLOSED
- pre-commit clean across all files
- Full suite ~755 + 1 skipped
